data.body:
=== CHECKPOINT 2 (op-cert epic) ===
DELIVERED (verify+storage+config+gate half — 4 children + keystone, all held-out-TDD + mutation-checked + adversarially reviewed + real CI/review findings remediated, pushed as stack 649<-650<-660<-664):
 - 368c (kind) 649: closed+green pre-rebase.
 - 42d1 (config/policy) 650: closed+green.
 - e4df (storage keystone) 660: pushed; completion-gate rollout-note blocker remediated; CI re-running on new patchset.
 - 4214 (merge-gate verify-opcert) 664: pushed; INTERCEPT_COMMANDS regression + a REAL fail-open security finding (compacted-anchor) both fixed; LLM-Review+1.
REMAINING (producer/infra half — large + partly operational + high-blast-radius):
 - ee0b (trusted-server HTTP handler + AWS IaC): 4 review rounds, still surfacing infra detail (r5 running bbye6f8ff); PARTLY OPERATIONAL — AWS deploy is [operator-attested], cannot complete autonomously. Full impl = HTTP service + gate dispatch + Terraform + Dockerfile + Secrets Manager + integration tests.
 - 8f1d (HMAC removal): high-blast-radius core-signing migration; needs a local-env-key producer decision (how local gates mint op-certs) — another design fork like the e4df keystone.
 - 6a89 (docs/ADR): non-code; documents the settled model.
DECISION FOR OWNER: continue autonomous grind on the infra/migration half (ee0b converging slowly + AWS deploy operator-only; 8f1d needs a producer-key decision), or pause here with the verify half landed. Notifying.
